name: plain hi → English + asks name
rule: Reply is in English, warm, concise, and asks for the lead's name. It must NOT dump property listings or prices.
raw: Hi! Welcome to SK Properties 😊 May I know your good name? And by the way, I can chat in English, हिंदी or मराठी — jo comfortable ho!
reply: Hi! Welcome to SK Properties 😊 May I know your good name? And by the way, I can chat in English, हिंदी or मराठी — jo comfortable ho!
judgeWhy: PASS - The reply is in English, warm, concise, and asks for the lead's name without dumping property listings or prices, while also offering language options in a friendly manner.
